summary: Iteration 63 - Tested all 3 critical bug fixes (article tenant isolation, Partner Orgs tab visibility, Tenant B audit logs) + P2 payment fallback and sessionStorage hydration fix. All 18 backend tests pass. All frontend tests pass visually.

issues: Console shows hydration warnings: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' - appears to be from Emergent VE tooling injecting span wrappers around dynamic select options (x-dynamic='true'), NOT actual code bugs. Lines 169-170 in CustomersTab.tsx render <option>{opt.label}</option> which is correct HTML.

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 critical bugs fixed correctly: (1) GET /api/articles/{id} now uses X-View-As-Tenant header for platform admins - verified via backend tests and UI screenshot showing TB article loading for both TB admin and platform admin viewing-as TB; (2) Platform admin WITHOUT X-View-As-Tenant correctly gets 404 for TB articles; (3) Partner Orgs tab correctly hidden when viewingAsTenant=true and RESTORED when reverting to All Tenants; (4) Audit logs scoped correctly - TB admin only sees TB logs.
P2 Payment fallback working: test-new-corp ProductDetail shows 'Request a Quote' button (not Add to Cart) when no payment methods configured.
P2 TenantSwitcher sessionStorage: module-level reads properly wrapped in try/catch + typeof window check (line 15 of TenantSwitcher.tsx).
seed_data_creation: Created test product '54a29e83-1240-4b9a-aade-b8dd17c5a70b' for test-new-corp-seed to test Request a Quote flow. Deactivated after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 tested bug fixes. All 3 critical bugs are confirmed fixed. TB article at /articles/7f2d54e3-46dd-4fdc-8b37-09816e04a9ca loads correctly for TB admin (adminb@tenantb.local / ChangeMe123! / partner_code: tenant-b-test). Platform admin + X-View-As-Tenant=e7301988-7f0f-4b2b-a678-4e37882e385f can also access it. Partner Orgs tab correctly hidden/shown based on viewingAsTenant state. Audit logs for TB show 2 events (ARTICLE_UPDATED). test-new-corp shows 'Request a Quote' (no payment methods). TenantSwitcher sessionStorage is safe. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter63_bug_fixes.py (18 tests).
